## Skill Submission

**Skill name:**
**Category:**

### Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has frontmatter with `name`, `description`, and `category`
- [ ] Description includes at least one trigger phrase (what the user types to invoke it)
- [ ] At least one usage example in the description
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys, credentials, or PII
- [ ] Tested: invoked `/your-skill-name` in Claude Code and it fires correctly
- [ ] SKILL.md is under 500 lines (or split into reference files if longer)

### What does this skill do?

[1-2 sentences]

### Why is it useful?

[1-2 sentences]
